document.source_title: Punjab Kings contradict their physio's statement, say Arshdeep Singh 'fully fit'

claims.claim_text: Arshdeep Singh is fully fit and training regularly with the squad.
claims.evidence_text: Punjab Kings on Monday issued a clarification on the fitness of pacer Arshdeep Singh, saying the left-arm seamer is 'fully fit' and training regularly with the squad despite recent concerns over his physical condition.

entities.name: Arshdeep Singh
entities.description: Left-arm seamer and leading fast bowler for Punjab Kings.
entities.evidence_text: Arshdeep Singh, saying the left-arm seamer is 'fully fit' and training regularly with the squad.

entities.name: Punjab Kings
entities.description: Cricket team in the Indian Premier League.
entities.evidence_text: Punjab Kings on Monday issued a clarification on the fitness of pacer Arshdeep Singh.

entities.name: Andrew Leipus
entities.description: Head of sports science for Punjab Kings.
entities.evidence_text: PBKS head of sports science Andrew Leipus had indicated before the RCB match that Arshdeep was dealing with some physical restrictions.

events.event: Punjab Kings vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru match
events.evidence_text: The franchise released the statement a day after their 23-run defeat to Royal Challengers Bengaluru in IPL 2026.

metrics.name: Economy Rate
metrics.evidence_text: Against RCB in Dharamshala on Sunday, he conceded 43 runs in four overs at an economy rate of 10.75 while taking one wicket.
